positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u26,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(luke)).

cnf(u29,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(luke)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~multiple_birth(X0) | spend_time_with_siblings(X0)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | live_at_home(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define have_siblings_born_together(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define complain_about_siblings(X0) := $false
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable

negative.stdout:
% Refutation found. Thanks to Tanya!
% SZS status Theorem for negative
% SZS output start Proof for negative
1. ! [X0] : (multiple_birth(X0) => spend_time_with_siblings(X0)) [input(axiom)]
2. ! [X0] : (have_siblings_born_together(X0) => multiple_birth(X0)) [input(axiom)]
3. ! [X0] : (complain_about_siblings(X0) => have_siblings_born_together(X0)) [input(axiom)]
4. ! [X0] : (live_at_home(X0) => ~live_with_strangers(X0)) [input(axiom)]
5. ! [X0] : (spend_time_with_siblings(X0) => live_at_home(X0)) [input(axiom)]
6. (multiple_birth(luke) & live_with_strangers(luke)) | (~multiple_birth(luke) & ~live_with_strangers(luke)) [input(axiom)]
7. ~complain_about_siblings(luke) [input(conjecture)]
8. ~~complain_about_siblings(luke) [negated conjecture 7]
9. complain_about_siblings(luke) [flattening 8]
10. ! [X0] : (spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | ~multiple_birth(X0)) [ennf transformation 1]
11. ! [X0] : (multiple_birth(X0) | ~have_siblings_born_together(X0)) [ennf transformation 2]
12. ! [X0] : (have_siblings_born_together(X0) | ~complain_about_siblings(X0)) [ennf transformation 3]
13. ! [X0] : (~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0)) [ennf transformation 4]
14. ! [X0] : (live_at_home(X0) | ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0)) [ennf transformation 5]
15. ~multiple_birth(X0) | spend_time_with_siblings(X0) [cnf transformation 10]
16. ~have_siblings_born_together(X0) | multiple_birth(X0) [cnf transformation 11]
17. ~complain_about_siblings(X0) | have_siblings_born_together(X0) [cnf transformation 12]
18. ~live_with_strangers(X0) | ~live_at_home(X0) [cnf transformation 13]
19. ~spend_time_with_siblings(X0) | live_at_home(X0) [cnf transformation 14]
21. live_with_strangers(luke) | ~multiple_birth(luke) [cnf transformation 6]
24. complain_about_siblings(luke) [cnf transformation 9]
26. 1 <=> multiple_birth(luke) [avatar definition]
27. multiple_birth(luke) <- (1) [avatar component clause 26]
28. ~multiple_birth(luke) <- (~1) [avatar component clause 26]
30. 2 <=> live_with_strangers(luke) [avatar definition]
32. live_with_strangers(luke) <- (2) [avatar component clause 30]
33. ~1 | 2 [avatar split clause 21,30,26]
35. have_siblings_born_together(luke) [resolution 17,24]
36. multiple_birth(luke) [resolution 35,16]
37. $false <- (~1) [forward subsumption resolution 36,28]
38. 1 [avatar contradiction clause 37]
39. spend_time_with_siblings(luke) <- (1) [resolution 27,15]
40. ~live_at_home(luke) <- (2) [resolution 18,32]
41. live_at_home(luke) <- (1) [resolution 19,39]
42. $false <- (1, 2) [forward subsumption resolution 41,40]
43. ~1 | ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 42]
s1. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 33]
s3. 1 [sat_conversion 38]
s4. ~2 | ~1 [sat_conversion 43]
s5. ~2 [rat s4,s3]
s6. # [rat s1,s5,s3]
44. $false [avatar sat refutation s6]
% SZS output end Proof for negative
% Termination reason: Refutation
